{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Eightfold Spear
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Path of the Eightfold Spear]] is associated with the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path of the Eightfold Spear]] is a complex bond of mind and spirit woven through Divine Treasures.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path of the Eightfold Spear]] is a path followed by [[Larian]] and others.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
